Mountain Goat_2-11_5001: Mountain Goat hunting in Mt. Meager during September and October. This is one of the most physically demanding hunts in BC. Plan to gain significant elevation and spend time in rocky, exposed terrain. A billy is the preferred target and generally larger with longer, more curved horns than nannies.
